titleStmt.title: SII 19.7: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 7. (A.R. No. 242 of 1911.) ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 90 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirukkīḻkōṭṭattu-Paramasvāmi at Tirukkuḍamukkil, a dēvadāna in Pāmbūrnāḍu on the northern bank of the river, by Dēvaṉ Rājādittaṉ (a member) of the Dānatoṅga-teriñja-Kaikkōḷar (regiment), with 7(1/2) nāḻi of ghee supplied every month by two shepherds who received the sheep. Dānatuṅga was a title of king Parāntaka I (M.E.R. 1918, Part II, para 22). This is probably a record of Ariñjaya.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecarivarmaṟku yāṇ
ṭu 2 Āvatu vaṭakaraip pāmpūrnāṭṭu tteva
tāṉam tirukkuṭamukkil tirukkiḻkoṭṭattu
paramasvāmikku tirunontāviḷakku vaitta Uṭai
yār tānatoṅkatteriñca kaikkoḷaril
tevan rājādittaṉ vaitta viḷakku Onṟu Itinā
lāṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟilum
Ivvūr manṟāṭi tevaṭi tiruviyalūrum koṟṟaṉ tiṟalanu
m Ivviruvom pātippāti ney tiṅkaḷ Oroto
muṉṉāḻi muḻākkāka Iruvomāy
tiṅkaḷ Eḻunāṭuri ney yaṭṭuva[tāṉom .*]
Digital edition of SII 19.7 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
